stages.native:
SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_requetes
  FROM
    "RequeteEntite" re
    JOIN "Entite" e ON e.id = re."entiteId"
    JOIN "Requete" r ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  WHERE
    re."statutId" = 'CLOTUREE'
    [[ AND e.label = {{entity_label}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" < ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ]];

SELECT
    cr.label              AS raison_cloture,
    COUNT(DISTINCT et.id) AS nb_requetes
  FROM "RequeteEntite" re
  JOIN "Entite" e
    ON e.id = re."entiteId"
  JOIN "Requete" r
    ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  JOIN "RequeteEtape" et
    ON et."requeteId" = re."requeteId"
   AND et."entiteId"  = re."entiteId"
   AND et."statutId"  = 'CLOTUREE'
  JOIN "_RequeteClotureReasonEnumToRequeteEtape" j
    ON j."B" = et.id
  JOIN "RequeteClotureReasonEnum" cr
    ON cr.id = j."A"
  WHERE re."statutId" = 'CLOTUREE'
    AND e.label = {{entity_label}}
    [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" <  ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day')]]
  GROUP BY cr.label
  ORDER BY nb_requetes DESC;

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_requetes
  FROM
    "RequeteEntite" re
    JOIN "Entite" e ON e.id = re."entiteId"
    JOIN "Requete" r ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  WHERE
    re."statutId" = 'NOUVEAU'
    [[ AND e.label = {{entity_label}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" < ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ]];

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_requetes
  FROM
    "RequeteEntite" re
    JOIN "Entite" e ON e.id = re."entiteId"
    JOIN "Requete" r ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  WHERE
    re."statutId" = 'EN_COURS'
    [[ AND e.label = {{entity_label}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" < ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ]];

SELECT
    COUNT(*) AS nombre_requetes
  FROM
    "RequeteEntite" re
    JOIN "Entite" e ON e.id = re."entiteId"
    JOIN "Requete" r ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  WHERE
    TRUE
    [[ AND e.label = {{entity_label}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."createdAt" < ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ]];

-- Nombre de requêtes de l'entité de l'agent connecté qui sont en compétence partagée,
-- c.-à-d. affectées à au moins une AUTRE entité administrative « réellement » compétente.
-- Une autre entité est ignorée si elle a clôturé la requête pour motif « Hors compétence ».
SELECT
  COUNT(DISTINCT re_self."requeteId") AS nombre_requetes_competence_partagee
FROM "RequeteEntite" re_self
JOIN "Entite"   e ON e.id = re_self."entiteId"
JOIN "Requete"  r ON r.id = re_self."requeteId"
WHERE
  e.label = {{entity_label}}
  AND EXISTS (
    -- une autre entité affectée à la même requête...
    SELECT 1
    FROM "RequeteEntite" re_other
    WHERE re_other."requeteId" = re_self."requeteId"
      AND re_other."entiteId" <> re_self."entiteId"
      -- ...qui n'est PAS clôturée « Hors compétence »
      AND NOT (
        re_other."statutId" = 'CLOTUREE'
        AND EXISTS (
          SELECT 1
          FROM "RequeteEtape" et
          JOIN "_RequeteClotureReasonEnumToRequeteEtape" j ON j."B" = et.id
          WHERE et."requeteId" = re_other."requeteId"
            AND et."entiteId"  = re_other."entiteId"
            AND et."statutId"  = 'CLOTUREE'
            AND j."A"          = 'HORS_COMPETENCE'
        )
      )
  )
  [[ AND r."createdAt" >= {{start_date}} ]]
  [[ AND r."createdAt" <  ({{end_date}}::date + INTERVAL '1 day') ]];

-- Carte : « Répartition du nombre de requêtes par motif (qualifié, dernier niveau) »
-- + ligne « Aucun motif » pour les requêtes sans motif qualifié.
-- entity_label = paramètre Metabase Locked, cf. docs/metabase_dashboards/FILTERS.md
WITH requetes_entite AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT r.id AS requete_id
  FROM "RequeteEntite" re
  JOIN "Entite"  e ON e.id = re."entiteId"
  JOIN "Requete" r ON r.id = re."requeteId"
  WHERE e.label = {{entity_label}}
    [[ AND r."receptionDate" >= {{start_date}} ]]
    [[ AND r."receptionDate" <= {{end_date}} ]]
),
total AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS nb_total FROM requetes_entite
),
requete_motif AS (
  -- 1 ligne par (requête, motif qualifié dernier niveau)
  SELECT DISTINCT re.requete_id, m.label AS motif
  FROM requetes_entite re
  JOIN "Situation" s  ON s."requeteId"    = re.requete_id
  JOIN "FaitMotif" fm ON fm."situationId" = s.id
  JOIN "MotifEnum" m  ON m.id             = fm."motifId"
),
par_motif AS (
  SELECT motif, COUNT(*) AS nb_requetes
  FROM requete_motif
  GROUP BY motif

  UNION ALL

  -- Requêtes de l'entité sans aucun motif qualifié
  SELECT 'Aucun motif' AS motif, COUNT(*) AS nb_requetes
  FROM requetes_entite re
  WHERE NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM requete_motif rm WHERE rm.requete_id = re.requete_id
  )
)
SELECT
  pm.motif                                                 AS "Motif",
  pm.nb_requetes                                           AS "Nombre de requêtes",
  ROUND(100.0 * pm.nb_requetes / NULLIF(t.nb_total, 0), 1) AS "Part (%)"
FROM par_motif pm
CROSS JOIN total t
WHERE pm.nb_requetes > 0
ORDER BY pm.nb_requetes DESC
